notificationId.description: Stable idempotency key — delivery dedups on this (doc 05 §reliability).

correlationId.description: Correlation Identifier tying the request to its Case (doc 05 §11).

caseId.description: The Case this notification belongs to — a DecisionRecord stitch key (doc 04 §5.1).

stepId.description: The flow step that requested the notification — the DecisionRecord stitch key for `notify.*` events.

template.description: The referenced template (`id@version`); its `channel` selects the provider driver.

locale.description: The BCP-47 locale to render — must resolve to an entry in the template's `text` map.

recipient.description: The delivery address (email address / phone number) — opaque to rendering.

params.description: The substitution values for the template's declared `params`.

description:
A canonical **notification request** (doc 05 §4.2) — the outbound event fed from the transactional
outbox to the notification port. `notificationId` is the stable idempotency key the Idempotent
Receiver dedups on; `correlationId` + `caseId` + `stepId` tie it to its Case for DecisionRecord
stitching. `params` supplies the values the referenced template substitutes for its declared params.
